title: salix repens var. arenaria
intro: Salix repens var. arenaria, commonly known as creeping willow or Arctic willow, is a variety of the creeping willow plant, a type of deciduous shrub that belongs to the willow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Salix repens var. arenaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
